title: Tool Settings
subtitle: Tool execution configuration and available tool list

config.title: Execution Behavior
config.description: Control confirmation and timeout policies for tool calls.

config.autoExecuteDesc: Skip user confirmation before tool execution.
config.confirmTimeoutDesc: Maximum time (seconds) to wait for user confirmation of tool calls.
config.executionTimeoutDesc: Maximum time (seconds) for tool execution, including Task subagent runs.
config.writeToolModeDesc: Choose whether the Write tool sends file content inline or generates it in a separate follow-up step. ACP sessions always use inline content.

writeToolModeOptions.plaintextFollowupDesc: Expose only file_path to the model, then generate the full file body in a second step.
writeToolModeOptions.inlineContentDesc: Expose both file_path and content so the model sends the full file body in one tool call.
